testcase.name: GR002

failure.message:
element click intercepted: Element is not clickable at point (1024, 399). Other element would receive the click:
...
(Session info: chrome=148.0.7778.217) Build info: version: '4.24.0', revision: '748ffc9bc3' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '25.0.2' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [4630675012fd99c39693605fcab2ac4f, clickElement {id=f.976D4E752521B12BB54D2CED03E5FB96.d.3AD2359FB8B5A419456E6513C3CF9DF7.e.5}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 148.0.7778.217, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 148.0.7778.178 (d096af1c9e9..., userDataDir: C:\Users\User\AppData\Local...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:49708}, goog:processID: 133236, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:49708/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 148.0.7778.217, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Element: [[ChromeDriver: chrome on windows (4630675012fd99c39693605fcab2ac4f)] -> xpath: //button[@type='submit']] Session ID: 4630675012fd99c39693605fcab2ac4f

SLF4J: Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J: See http://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#StaticLoggerBinder for further details. Jun 18, 2026 3:32:42 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 148 Jun 18, 2026 3:32:42 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 148.0.7778.217. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.24.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.
